sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30347" key="e)gkoita/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκοιτ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serving for a bed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀκρώρειαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.626</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
